deck.title: GenAI
deck.tagline: Four narratives. One story. Select a topic to explore.
deck.introSubtitle: From prototype to production in 2 months

human.title: Human in the Loop
human.subtitle: AI Accelerates. Humans Govern.

cards.title: Gated Review Process
cards.body: Every line of AI-assisted code passed through structured pull request reviews with project-specific checklists before reaching production.

cards.title: Context-Rich Prompts
cards.body: Standardized prompt templates embedded with architecture documentation, data models, and coding standards kept AI output anchored to the actual system.

cards.title: Zero Critical Defects
cards.body: Disciplined human governance produced zero critical defects at production release — proving speed doesn’t sacrifice quality.

human.callout: AI generated the code. Humans owned every decision. That’s not a limitation — it’s the model.

hurdles.title: Hurdles We Overcame
hurdles.subtitle: What changed from day one to delivery

cards.title: Prompt Standardization
cards.challenge: Developers used ad-hoc, inconsistent prompts — variable quality and constant refactoring.
cards.fix: Established versioned prompt templates with embedded architecture context and coding standards.

cards.title: Process Realignment
cards.challenge: Traditional review workflows didn’t account for AI-generated code patterns and volume.
cards.fix: Introduced AI-specific gated review checklists — convention adherence, test validation on every PR.

cards.title: Governance Clearance
cards.challenge: Federal context required legal and policy approval before any AI-assisted code could reach production.
cards.fix: Proactively engaged internal risk, internal legal, and client legal to establish approval frameworks.

cards.title: Team Enablement
cards.challenge: Team had varying levels of comfort and fluency with AI-assisted development tooling.
cards.fix: Internal hackathon built hands-on proficiency with tools and guardrails before delivery began.

hurdles.callout: Every hurdle became a guardrail. The friction we overcame early is the governance that keeps us fast now.

sprint.title: AI Sprint Cycle
sprint.subtitle: Human checkpoints at every stage of AI-assisted delivery
sprint.callout: The AI modified sprint cycle includes numerous human-in-the-loop checkpoints. Development included rapid iterations and adherence to Agile best practices.

future.title: Looking Ahead
future.subtitle: Better steering — not more automation — is the next multiplier

cards.title: Model Steering & Planning
cards.body: System prompts, prefills, and tool configs encode architecture standards and compliance guardrails before developers write a single prompt.

cards.title: Evolved Prompt Library
cards.body: Templates evolve from standalone instructions to modular components operating within a steered context — version-controlled, regression-tested.

cards.title: Human-Governed Pipeline
cards.body: Automated static analysis and security scanning assist at every commit, but humans make the merge and deploy decisions.

cards.title: Team Enablement Kit
cards.body: Onboarding now covers model steering techniques alongside prompt writing — adoption in days, not months.

future.callout: The playbook is proven. The automated pipeline turns one project win into a practice-wide competitive advantage.
